structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-10-24 - DSCR Loan Origination in Non-Licensed States
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-10-24 13:03:35-07:00


ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY
 
NOVA is excited to share that Loan Officers may now originate DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio) loans in states where they are not individually licensed, as long as the state is one in which NOVA is licensed to operate. Because DSCR loans are classified as commercial-purpose transactions rather than consumer-purpose mortgages, typical state licensing laws do not apply. This gives our LOs expanded flexibility to help investors in additional markets without the need for new state licensing.
 
To make this possible, NOVA is partnering with two of our brokers: Lendsure and HomeXpress, both of whom allow DSCR loans to be originated by non-licensed LOs in certain states. The attached chart outlines which NOVA-licensed states are eligible through each broker, along with any applicable state-specific conditions. Please review the chart carefully before submitting a loan, and reach out to Product with any questions.
AE CONTACTS
 
*	Melanie McLanahan; mmclanahan@homexmortgage.com; 949.652.7646
*	Stacy Storck; sstorck@lendsure.com; 713.449.5313
 
ATTACHMENTS
 
*	 State Eligibility Spreadsheet <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EvlHlcVNcCBJoDoyrYFIQNMBoIPaJfIV_pGbEDkpgUw8Dg?e=nHoqZm> 
*	 Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EvlHlcVNcCBJoDoyrYFIQNMBoIPaJfIV_pGbEDkpgUw8Dg?e=nHoqZm> 
 
** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **
 
Contact Us:
